extDescription.message: 원문과 번역을 나란히 보여주는 브라우저 번역 확장. 선택 번역과 전체 페이지 번역을 지원합니다.
extDescription.description: Description shown in store listings and the browser's extension list.

cmdTogglePageTranslateDescription.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that toggles full-page translation.

cmdTranslateSelectionDescription.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that translates the currently selected text.

cmdEnterRegionModeDescription.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut that enters the region (element) selection mode.
